headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — use today to drive the 'no ground truth' evals design doc forward before the next bi-weekly TR cycle.

must_make_progress.task: Review the Big Rock TR page for any action items or follow-ups assigned to you from the 3/18 meeting
must_make_progress.why: Evals, Context Engineering, and Templates/Patterns are all in-flight; confirm nothing is waiting on your input

Salesforce and Snowflake credential failures — request token refresh or credential reset

flags: Salesforce auth is broken (INVALID_LOGIN) — you have zero visibility into customer escalations. Fix urgently.
Snowflake credentials are empty — all product telemetry and MBR dashboard metrics are inaccessible.
AE-1079 has no due date set; risk of silent slippage on a key evals deliverable for 26.4.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — priority is restoring observability (Salesforce/Snowflake) and advancing the evals design doc that underpins a core 26.4 deliverable.
outcomes.product_adoption: Adoption metrics currently unavailable due to broken Snowflake auth; the no-ground-truth evals design doc (AE-1079) is the key adoption-enabling work item to advance today.

slack_summary: Clear day with no meetings, emails, or Slack pings — ideal deep-work window. Top priority: make real progress on the no-ground-truth evals design doc (AE-1079), a key 26.4 deliverable. Second priority: get Salesforce and Snowflake credentials fixed — both are broken and you're blind on escalations and metrics. Zero meetings today.
